mapper.insert:
SELECT NOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO notice ( noticenum, subject, content, hitcount, regdate, isnotice, state, authorEmpId ) VALUES ( #{noticenum}, #{subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSDATE, #{isnotice}, 1, #{authorEmpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET subject = #{subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isnotice = #{isnotice}, updatedate = SYSDATE WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum}
mapper.select:
SELECT n.noticenum, n.subject, n.hitcount, n.isnotice, n.state, TO_CHAR(n.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regdate, TO_CHAR(n.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updateDate, n.authorEmpId, e2.name AS authorName FROM notice n LEFT JOIN employee2 e2 ON n.authorEmpId = e2.empId WHERE n.state = 1
AND (n.subject LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR n.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY n.isnotice DESC, n.noticenum DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE state = 1
AND (subject LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT n.noticenum, n.subject, n.content, n.hitcount, n.isnotice, n.state, TO_CHAR(n.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regdate, TO_CHAR(n.updatedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updateDate, n.authorEmpId, e2.name AS authorName FROM notice n LEFT JOIN employee2 e2 ON n.authorEmpId = e2.empId WHERE n.noticenum = #{noticenum}
SELECT filenum, savefilename, originalfilename, filesize, noticenum FROM noticefile WHERE noticenum = #{noticenum} ORDER BY filenum ASC
